channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Heirs await court decision over Hancock mining estate
item.description: After nearly two decades, a pivotal court decision is imminent in the long-standing dispute over the Hancock mining fortune. The legal conflict involves Gina Rinehart, daughter of the late mining pion...

item.title: Delhi Police detain young Bhubaneswar resident in radicalisation probe linked to online activities
item.description: The Delhi Police Special Cell has taken into custody a 22-year-old man from Bhubaneswar, identified as Sheikh Imran, in connection with an ongoing investigation into suspected radicalisation and terro...

item.title: Air quality in Metro Manila worsens after fire at Navotas landfill
item.description: A fire that broke out at the Navotas landfill has severely affected the air quality across Metro Manila, bringing it down to a 'very unhealthy' level according to authorities. The Department of Enviro...

item.title: Religious Tensions Lead to Killing of Spiritual Leader in Bangladesh
item.description: Officials in Bangladesh don talk say one self-proclaimed spiritual leader, Shamim Reza Jahangir, wey dem believe say him dey around sixty years old, don die after mob of hundreds beat am inside Kushti...

item.title: Government Plans to Tarmac Key Roads in Saboti, Boosting Local Development
item.description: Residents of Saboti Constituency in Trans Nzoia County are finally set to see major improvements in their road infrastructure. MP Caleb Amisi has welcomed the government’s announcement to tarmac sever...

item.title: NASA launches campaign to renew public interest in lunar exploration
item.description: NASA has reportedly been ramping up efforts to rekindle public interest in lunar exploration through its newest outreach initiative called “Howl at the Moon.” While the full France24 article could not...

item.title: Centre Increases Export Duties On Diesel And Jet Fuel Amid Israel-Iran Conflict
item.description: The Government of India has recently announced an increase in the export duty on diesel and aviation turbine fuel (ATF), following global developments linked to the Israel-Iran conflict. The export du...

item.title: Ben Affleck Transfers Ownership of Beverly Hills Mansion to Jennifer Lopez
item.description: Hollywood actor Ben Affleck has officially handed over his share of the lavish Beverly Hills mansion he bought with ex-wife Jennifer Lopez, making her the sole owner of the $60 million property. The m...

item.title: Multi-vehicle Accident in Katihar, Bihar Leaves 13 Dead and 30 Injured
item.description: On Saturday evening, a tragic accident occurred in Bihar's Katihar district involving a bus, a truck, and a pickup van, resulting in the death of 13 people and injuries to 30 others. The collision too...

item.title: Democratic Alliance Hosts Largest Federal Congress at Gallagher Convention Centre
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) is convening its largest-ever Federal Congress at the Gallagher Convention Centre in Midrand on 11 and 12 April 2026. This significant political gathering is set to bring ...

item.title: Afghanistan veterans say Roberts-Smith prosecution unfairly tarnishes their service
item.description: Australian Afghanistan war veterans have voiced deep frustration, saying they are being unfairly tarnished by the criminal prosecution of former soldier Ben Roberts-Smith, a decorated war hero charged...

item.title: Artemis II Completes Historic Crewed Lunar Flyby and Safe Earth Return
item.description: The Artemis II mission has concluded successfully with the splashdown of the Orion capsule Integrity in the Pacific Ocean on April 11, 2026, at 00:07:27 UTC. Astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Ch...

item.title: Ondo Police Arrest Three Over Assault and Attempted Abduction of Traffic Officers
item.description: For Ondo State, police don arrest three people wey dey involved in two separate wahala wey concern assault and attempted abduction of traffic officers. The first case happen on April 3, 2026, when one...

item.title: Motorcycle accident claims life of CDO student after avoiding birds
item.description: In Cagayan de Oro City, a tragic accident claimed the life of 24-year-old student Roldan Torremocha on Thursday. Torremocha was riding his motorcycle along Barangay Lapasan when a flock of birds desce...

item.title: Pakistan Hosts Historic US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: Islamabad has become the centre of attention on the global stage as Pakistan hosts critical peace talks between the United States and Iran. Amid rising tensions and fears of a potential regional war t...

item.title: AmaZulu hold Siwelele to 1-1 draw despite playing with 10 men
item.description: AmaZulu managed to secure a hard-earned 1-1 draw against Siwelele in a Betway Premiership match at the Dr Molemela Stadium in Bloemfontein on Saturday. Siwelele took the lead in the 30th minute throug...

item.title: Pakistani family reported killed in Kuwait after missile debris incident, relatives seek official verification
item.description: Relatives of a Pakistani man, Waqas Ahmad, residing in Kuwait, are urgently appealing to the Pakistani authorities for confirmation and assistance following a tragic incident reportedly involving miss...

item.title: Jack and Heather’s Manchester Blind Date Experience
item.description: Jack, a 31-year-old nature consultant, and Heather, a 23-year-old marketing professional at a homelessness charity, met for a blind date in Manchester, sharing an evening at Refuge at Kimpton Clocktow...

item.title: Ouaddou confident Orlando Pirates can still challenge Sundowns for league title
item.description: Orlando Pirates head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou insists his side will continue to fight for the DStv Premiership title despite dropping points in a 2-2 draw with Richards Bay. The Buccaneers missed a chan...

item.title: Teenager dies after dog attack in Essex home
item.description: A 19-year-old woman tragically lost her life following a dog attack at a house in Leaden Roding, near Great Dunmow, Essex, late on Friday night. Essex Police stated that they were called to the addres...
